title: Reliability
description:
Indicates the system's ability to operate consistently and without failures over time. A reliable system maintains its functioning even under adverse conditions.
[ul]
[b]Failure freedom[/b]: works without frequent failures.
[b]Availability[/b]: accessible when needed.
[b]Fault tolerance[/b]: continues operating despite errors.
[b]Recoverability[/b]: recovers data and state after failures.[/ul]
